name: Michael Rodriguez
intro: Michael Rodriguez is a DevOps engineer and open-source contributor specializing in CI/CD pipelines, automation, and cloud infrastructure. He enjoys improving developer workflows and building scalable systems.

qa.question: What is your background prior to contributing to Jenkins?
qa.answer: Before contributing to Jenkins, Michael worked at a fintech startup where he was responsible for backend services and deployment automation. He built CI/CD pipelines from scratch and improved release cycles significantly.

qa.question: How long have you been using Jenkins?
qa.answer: Michael has been using Jenkins since 2017. Over time, he has contributed to pipeline optimization and plugin integrations.

qa.question: What made you choose Jenkins over other projects?
qa.answer: He chose Jenkins because of its flexibility and strong plugin ecosystem, which allowed him to customize pipelines according to project needs.

qa.question: What is your favorite feature of Jenkins?
qa.answer: Michael particularly likes Jenkins pipelines and the ability to define infrastructure as code, which makes automation more maintainable and scalable.

qa.question: What advice would you give to new contributors?
qa.answer: He recommends starting small, understanding the project structure, and gradually contributing to documentation or small fixes before moving to complex features.

name: Sarah Chen
intro: Sarah Chen is a DevOps engineer passionate about cloud infrastructure and automation. She actively contributes to open-source CI/CD tools and enjoys improving developer workflows.

qa.question: What is your background prior to contributing to Jenkins?
qa.answer: Before contributing to Jenkins, Sarah worked in a fast-paced startup environment where she built scalable backend systems and automated deployment pipelines.

qa.question: How long have you been using Jenkins?
qa.answer: She has been using Jenkins since 2019 and has contributed to improving pipeline performance and plugin integrations.

qa.question: What do you enjoy about contributing?
qa.answer: Sarah enjoys solving real-world problems and collaborating with a global open-source community.
